page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.16xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing the Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 64 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps. No graphics processing units are included in this configuration, and it does not provide complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.hfr6.16xlarge offers high memory density per dedicated core, making it suitable for enterprise workloads that require substantial memory capacity without the overhead of hyperthreading. The primary tradeoff is the complete reliance on network-attached storage and the absence of hardware acceleration. This profile is suited for in-memory databases, large-scale enterprise applications, memory-intensive data processing, and caching layers.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 3.1 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, it provides 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, offering high resource density for applications that benefit from dedicated physical cores. It is suited for in-memory databases, large-scale enterprise applications, and memory-heavy data processing tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for in-memory databases and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual instance featuring sixty-four dedicated Intel Xeon cores and five hundred twelve gigabytes of RAM for enterprise workloads.
